title: PPL Corporation (PPL) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: PPL Corporation (NYSE:PPL ) Q3 2022 Results Conference Call November 4, 2022 11:00 AM ET Company Participants Andy Ludwig - Vice President of Investor Relations Vince Sorgi - President and CEO Joe Bergstein - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Shar Pourreza - Guggenheim Partners Durgesh Chopra - Evercore ISI David Arcaro - Morgan Stanley Michael Lapides - Goldman Sachs Paul Zimbardo - Bank of America Nick Campanella - Credit Suisse Paul Patterson - Glenrock Associates Anthony Crowdell - Mizuho David Paz - Wolfe Research Operator Good day, and welcome to the PPL Corporation Third Quarter Earnings Conference Call [Operator Instructions]. Please note, this event is being recorded.

title: PPL Q3 Earnings Match Estimates, Revenues Beat the Mark
text: PPL Corp.'s (PPL) third-quarter earnings were in-line with estimates and the company narrowed its 2022 earnings guidance.

title: Utility Stocks' Q3 Earnings to Watch on Nov 4: D, PNM & More
text: Total Q3 earnings of Utility stocks are expected to decline 8.4% year over year, while revenues are likely to improve 7.9%. D, PNM, DUK & PPL are due to post their numbers tomorrow.

title: PPL Gears Up to Report Q3 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
text: PPL Corporation's (PPL) third-quarter earnings are expected to have benefited from higher sales volume in service territories and lower interest expenses.
